name: purity-ssr-stream-deno
description: Vite SSR-builds `src/serve.ts` to `dist/serve.js`; Deno runs the built artefact via `deno run --allow-net dist/serve.js`. The Vite build is needed to AOT-compile every `html\`\`` template into a string-builder factory (Deno has no `document`).

scripts.dev: npm run build && deno run --allow-net dist/serve.js
scripts.deploy: echo 'Push dist/serve.js (built via npm run build) to Deno Deploy.'
